videoSnippet.title: "Poor Guy, and Such a Hero..." || Fabi vs Alireza || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Caruana, Fabiano (2788) - Firouzja, Alireza (2759)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.05.14
D12 Queen's Gambit Declined Slav, 4.e3 Bf5

1.Nf3 d5 2.c4 c6 3.d4 Nf6 4.e3 Bf5 5.Nc3 e6 6.Nh4 Bg6 7.Nxg6 hxg6 8.Bd2 Be7 9.Qb3 Qc8 10.O-O-O dxc4 11.Bxc4 b5 12.Be2 a5 13.Kb1 Na6 14.Rc1 a4 15.Qd1 a3 16.b3 Qd7 17.f4 Rb8 18.g4 c5 19.g5 Nh5 20.Be1 c4 21.Ka1 O-O 22.Ne4 cxb3 23.axb3 Rfc8 24.Bc3 Rc7 25.Qd3 Qd5 26.Bd2 Rbc8 27.Bf3 Qd7 28.Rxc7 Rxc7 29.Rc1 Rxc1+ 30.Bxc1 Nb4 31.Qd2 Qa7 32.Nc3 Qa6 33.Be2 Qa8 34.Bxb5 Qh1 35.Bc4 Kh7 36.Nb1 Nc6 37.Bb5 Nd8 38.Ka2 Qb7 39.Qe2 f6 40.Bd3 f5 41.Bxa3 Qa7 42.Qc2 e5 43.fxe5 Bxg5 44.Qc8 Nf7 45.e6 Nh6 46.Qd7 Qb8 47.e7 Nf6 48.Qd6 Qa8 49.Qg3 Nhg4 50.h3 Nh5 51.Qg1 Bxe3 52.Qe1 Nf4 53.hxg4 Qg2+ 54.Nd2

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:25 ALIREZA
01:00 FOOTAGE!
01:45 Game Starts!
03:15 CNG (Qb3)
09:30 Pause the video!
13:10 It Was in This Position!
14:50 STANDINGS AFTER ROUND 5
